reasoning: Your primary limiter is poor lactate clearance along with an underdeveloped aerobic base. Your last ride showed a lower average power output, likely due to the extended rest period. We need to focus on building fatigue resistance to prepare for the sustained demands of the Alpine Loop, particularly the key climb from Sundance to Cascade Springs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x 10-minute blocks at 209-223W with 5-minute surges at 242-256W every third minute

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
